At whatever hour the anchorites wish to send to SOUBIBA ABOUT A DOG WHO SHOWED A BROTHER the garden for vegetables, they put a pack-saddle on the ass and say THE WAY to it: ‘Go to the one who tends the garden and bring us some vegetables’. You can see the ass returning him from the Syrians’ monastery at Soubiba.” This is what they told alone each time, but it oaly serves those elders; it supplies the needs us: of nobody else.
